creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 

Thanks for the submission, but this PR ticket will not be solved. That does not mean 
we are not going to MFC this; we will. Soren already has a patch available for 6-STABLE 
which I am running at the moment. Soren will MFC this work soon (it will not only process 
your patch, but also most of the -CURRENT ata code, without ofcourse the things that are 
not available on 6-STABLE). 

Thanks for the work; it is appriciated!!
